response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed the entire video (00:00 to 04:59). 2. Observed that the audio consists of the VTuber's voice, Minecraft gameplay sounds (harvesting), and background instrumental music. 3. Confirmed no vocal music exists throughout the video. 4. Created a single scene covering the entire duration.
response.global_summary: A continuous Minecraft gameplay stream with spoken commentary by the VTuber Nanashi Mumei. The audio consists primarily of game sound effects, spoken dialogue, and instrumental background music; there is no vocal music in this video.

scenes.description: The VTuber Nanashi Mumei plays Minecraft, harvesting watermelons while engaging in spoken commentary with the audience. Background music is purely instrumental.
